uplink.description: standard report: probe air temperature 22.5 C (cluster 0x0402)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard data report (cmd 0x0A). Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'temperature' = 22.5) and mapping cluster 0x0402 to air.temperature (signed centi-deg C / 100). Payload: 110A040200002908CA.

uplink.description: standard report: probe air temperature -5.25 C, negative two's-complement (cluster 0x0402)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard data report (cmd 0x0A) exercising the signed-16 path. Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'temperature' = -5.25) and mapping cluster 0x0402 to air.temperature. 0xFDF3 = -525 centi-deg C. Payload: 110A04020000 29FDF3.

uplink.description: read-attribute response: air temperature 24.5 C (cmd 0x01, value at offset 8, cluster 0x0402)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (read current value on cluster 0x0402, payload 11010402000000290992). cmd 0x01 inserts a status byte at index 6, so the value is at offset 8. Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'temperature' = 24.5) and mapping to air.temperature.

Synthetic in-bounds standard data report (cmd 0x0A). Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'humidity' = 55) and mapping cluster 0x0405 to air.relativeHumidity (unsigned centi-% / 100). Payload: 110A04050000 21157C.

uplink.description: standard report: relative humidity 37.21% from upstream example (cluster 0x0405)
uplink._note: Upstream example input (humidity value, payload 110A04050000210E89). Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'humidity' = 37.21) and mapping cluster 0x0405 to air.relativeHumidity.

uplink.description: standard report: disposable battery 3.642 V (cluster 0x0050 attr 6)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds power configuration report (cmd 0x0A, cluster 0x0050 attr 6). Expected value produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable 'disposable_battery_voltage' = 3.642) and mapping to battery (V). Flags byte 0x04 selects the disposable-battery 2-byte mV source (3642 mV). Payload: 110A005000064105 03040E3A.

uplink.description: proprietary Huffman batch frame is out of scope -> error
uplink._note: Upstream example input (batch of temperature + humidity + battery, payload 362100808098c31ecb824d7b07ba3d). Our codec rejects batch frames (frame-control bit0 clear); batch decoding is out of scope.
